title: My mom just got a mastectomy this week
body: When she was 11 her mom died of breast cancer, Before she was born her grandma died of breast cancer. She decided the risk of her getting breast cancer was so high that she needed to get a mastectomy just to be safe. They sent her breast tissue for testing and found pre-cancer. They said she would’ve gotten it within 1-3 years. If anyone needs a sign to get their mastectomy, this is it.
